textByHash.01b5409c9a955a90d0094d45481aec81b66c0d71: Impressive start... But now we fight for real!
textByHash.1a1350ce2e61ef9bee5b82cd7c73dc953e748887: They went on ahead. You should catch up. I'll cover the rear.
textByHash.59aeeb323a73a8294abe17cfeebfdbcd1d37f2e1: It seems you have some idea of combat after all, outerlander! I will not hold back so much this time!
textByHash.6637cf518f3c876cc52fb01a7e1211f45a5b74f5: You show some skill at combat... I will hold back no longer! This time you lose your prayer however, and fight like a warrior!
textByHash.704e678dab9d5a18035c47c53f3fc0ad77efbde2: Outerlander... you have made a mistake coming down here!
textByHash.76a29effe0897664ec5e23ca4a839fb0a135487b: What kind of a person calls himself ?
textByHash.7f950e8972392c95f7df403775996dfac945d646: I will crush your dead bones!
textByHash.8a39ced94a181f01d04d20051d4efa361a2d9aed: Prepare to face my power, outerlander!
textByHash.bd56c63e11f9a85e9c06411d024277b9d6ebcace: You have no idea of my true power, outerlander!
textByHash.c68991ca7f68850d8e4741bb1ead50815f7c52f2: What kind of a person calls herself ?
textByHash.f9e161b1975d4de4fadd225691d54c1d33379f89: Time to wake up. You have dragons to slay!
textByHash.fe4526bf865be0a85d8462af620cd47aa08ad5d8: Today is the day you die, outerlander!
